title: wedelia calycina
intro: Wedelia calycina, also known as the small flowered wedelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia calycina include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
